**Sunday, July 5, 2015**

This week, Senator Paul continued to promote his Fair & Flat Tax Plan which has seen overwhelming support from both taxpayers and tax policy experts. [Click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28855200:27731022653:m:1:879035888:C5EBF1342FFC4A4D4B7C125F4C369F1E:r) to learn more about Rand's tax reform plan. Thanks to your support, our End of Quarter Money Bomb raised over $1 million which will help fund our crucial early state campaign operations. If you would like to contribute now, please [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28855201:27731022653:m:1:879035888:C5EBF1342FFC4A4D4B7C125F4C369F1E:r).

On Thursday, Senator Paul finished a two-day swing through Iowa and was greeted with enthusiastic crowds at every stop. It is clear that the Hawkeye State and patriotic Americans across the country are standing with Rand to defeat the Washington machine and unleash the American dream.

I hope you had an enjoyable Independence Day weekend. More news and updates can be found below. Stay tuned for the next Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter.

Chip Englander
Campaign Manager
Rand Paul for President
�
�
| | |
## News of the Week
---
| | |
### Rand Paul's Tax Liberation Is A Road To Prosperity
The central issue for this presidential cycle is restoring economic growth and prosperity, which has continued to lag under President Obama for nearly seven years now, the longest period of such stagnation since the Great Depression. Central to such restoration is tax reform. Rand Paul has barnstormed into the lead on that issue, with his bold, pathbreaking, Fair and Flat Tax plan.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28855202:27731022653:m:1:879035888:C5EBF1342FFC4A4D4B7C125F4C369F1E:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul: I'll Defeat Hillary in Swing States
U.S. Sen. Rand Paul said Wednesday he stands out in a crowded field of Republican presidential candidates because of his ability to attract young, independent voters he believes will be needed to win the White House in November 2016. The Kentucky lawmaker said he can beat likely Democratic presidential candidate Hillary Clinton by winning key swing states.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28855203:27731022653:m:1:879035888:C5EBF1342FFC4A4D4B7C125F4C369F1E:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul, The Most Frugal Lawmaker Of Them All
As White House hopefuls strike their presidential poses, the meticulous National Taxpayers Union Foundation continues to pore over their voting records, which brings us to Sen. Rand Paul, the latest subject of the organization's research. No spender is he. During his first two terms in Congress, the Kentucky lawmaker actually proposed savings agendas that would cut $483.8 billion per year, on average, from the federal budget.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28855204:27731022653:m:1:879035888:C5EBF1342FFC4A4D4B7C125F4C369F1E:r)
---

## Volunteer of the Week
---
| � |
### Kristin Noble
#### New Hampshire
Kristin is a Republican activist from Bedford who has put in countless hours in support of liberty causes. In addition to helping get the Manchester office ready for the grand opening, she also hosted a Memorial Day barbecue for supporters of Rand Paul in Hillsborough County.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28855207:27731022653:m:1:879035888:C5EBF1342FFC4A4D4B7C125F4C369F1E:r)
